display.purpose: Hero vehicle names, major page titles, and editorial lead moments.

headline.purpose: Section titles, ranking modules, and comparison headers.

title.purpose: Cards, deal names, modal headings, and component titles.

body.purpose: Explanatory copy, values, helper text, and article summaries.

label.purpose: Badges, nav categories, rating labels, CTA labels, and filter chips.

shadows.name: fine-lift
shadows.purpose: Search fields, small chips, and save controls.

shadows.name: card-lift
shadows.purpose: Raised controls and default card response.

shadows.name: editorial-overlay
shadows.purpose: Hovered deal cards, dropdowns, popovers, and modal shells.

shadows.name: deep-overlay
shadows.purpose: Rare full-screen overlays and high-priority floating panels.

motion.name: fast-state
motion.purpose: Hovers, focus changes, chips, and small control responses.

motion.name: normal-state
motion.purpose: Image zooms, card hover response, and default interactive transitions.

motion.name: slow-panel
motion.purpose: Modals, drawers, and larger state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Compact C/D cobalt action button for primary marketplace actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--color-blue-cobalt, #1B5F8A); color: var(--color-white, #ffffff); padding: 12px; border: 1px solid var(--color-white, #ffffff); border-radius: var(--border-radius-md, 6px); font-family: var(--font-body, Inter, sans-serif); font-size: var(--font-size-xs, 0.75rem); font-weight: var(--font-weight-extrabold, 800); letter-spacing: 0.44px; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color var(--transition-fast, 150ms ease), outline-color var(--transition-fast, 150ms ease); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--color-black, #000000); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-blue-cobalt, #1B5F8A); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Quiet utility action for supporting choices and comparison tools.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: var(--color-white, #ffffff); color: var(--color-blue-cobalt, #1B5F8A); padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid var(--color-blue-cobalt, #1B5F8A); border-radius: var(--border-radius-sm, 4px); font-family: var(--font-body, Inter, sans-serif); font-size: var(--font-size-sm, 0.75rem); font-weight: var(--font-weight-semibold, 600); letter-spacing: 0.03em; cursor: pointer; transition: background var(--transition-fast, 150ms ease), border-color var(--transition-fast, 150ms ease); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--color-gray-50, #fafafa); border-color: var(--color-blue-dark, #154d70); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-blue-cobalt, #1B5F8A); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Header Search Field
components.description: Primary utility search, pill-shaped and quiet until focused.
components.css: .ds-search { display: flex; align-items: center; height: 37px; max-width: 420px; background: var(--color-white, #ffffff); border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-300, #cdcdcd); border-radius: var(--border-radius-full, 9999px); padding: 0 14px 0 24px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm, 0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)); transition: border-color var(--transition-fast, 150ms ease); } .ds-search:focus-within { border-color: var(--color-blue-cobalt, #1B5F8A); } .ds-search-label { position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; overflow: hidden; clip: rect(0 0 0 0); } .ds-search-input { width: 100%; border: 0; outline: 0; background: transparent; color: var(--color-black, #000000); font-family: var(--font-body, Inter, sans-serif); font-size: var(--font-size-base, 0.875rem); font-style: italic; letter-spacing: -0.14px; } .ds-search-input::placeholder { color: var(--color-gray-600, #666666); }

components.name: Deal Card
components.description: Editorial vehicle card with image, rating, and factual offer signal.
components.html:
2026

Chevrolet Trax

Starting at $20,400

10/10
components.css: .ds-deal-card { width: 280px; overflow: hidden; background: var(--color-white, #ffffff); border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-200, #e5e5e5); border-radius: var(--border-radius-lg, 8px); color: var(--color-dark, #222222); font-family: var(--font-body, Inter, sans-serif); transition: box-shadow var(--transition-fast, 150ms ease); } .ds-deal-card:hover { box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg, 0 8px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12)); } .ds-deal-image { display: grid; place-items: center; aspect-ratio: 16 / 10; background: var(--color-gray-100, #f5f5f5); color: var(--color-gray-600, #666666); font-family: var(--font-heading, Inter, sans-serif); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-deal-body { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 16px 8px; } .ds-deal-body h3 { margin: 0; color: var(--color-dark, #222222); font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.2; font-weight: 800; } .ds-deal-body p { margin: 4px 0 0; color: var(--color-gray-600, #666666); font-size: 13px; } .ds-deal-rating { text-align: right; line-height: 1; } .ds-deal-rating strong { font-size: 28px; } .ds-deal-rating span { color: var(--color-gray-500, #6b6b6b); font-weight: 700; } .ds-deal-cta { width: calc(100% - 32px); margin: 0 16px 16px; padding: 10px 12px; border: 0; border-radius: var(--border-radius-md, 6px); background: var(--color-blue-cobalt, #1B5F8A); color: var(--color-white, #ffffff); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-deal-cta:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-blue-cobalt, #1B5F8A); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Active Chip
components.description: Filter chip with strong active state and compact editorial label.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-300, #cdcdcd); border-radius: var(--border-radius-full, 9999px); background: var(--color-white, #ffffff); color: var(--color-gray-600, #666666); font-family: var(--font-heading, Inter, sans-serif); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; white-space: nowrap; transition: border-color var(--transition-fast, 150ms ease), color var(--transition-fast, 150ms ease), background var(--transition-fast, 150ms ease); } .ds-chip:hover { border-color: var(--color-gray-500, #6b6b6b); color: var(--color-dark, #222222); } .ds-chip-active { background: var(--color-dark, #222222); border-color: var(--color-dark, #222222); color: var(--color-white, #ffffff); } .ds-chip span { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-width: 20px; height: 20px; padding: 0 6px; border-radius: var(--border-radius-full, 9999px); background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); color: inherit; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; } .ds-chip:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-blue-cobalt, #1B5F8A); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: White field with gray stroke, cobalt focus ring, and compact helper text.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; width: 280px; font-family: var(--font-body, Inter, sans-serif); } .ds-field span { color: var(--color-gray-700, #4a4a4a); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-field input { height: 44px; padding: 0 16px; border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-300, #cdcdcd); border-radius: var(--border-radius-sm, 4px); background: var(--color-white, #ffffff); color: var(--color-dark, #222222); font-size: 14px; transition: border-color var(--transition-fast, 150ms ease), box-shadow var(--transition-fast, 150ms ease); } .ds-field input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--color-blue-cobalt, #1B5F8A); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(27, 95, 138, 0.1); } .ds-field input::placeholder { color: var(--color-gray-500, #6b6b6b); } .ds-field small { color: var(--color-gray-500, #6b6b6b); font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Masthead Navigation
components.description: White masthead navigation with compact uppercase labels.
components.html: Browse all vehiclesShop new carsResearch cars
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; padding: 14px 24px; background: var(--color-white, #ffffff); box-shadow: 0 0 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25); font-family: var(--font-body, Inter, sans-serif); } .ds-nav a { color: var(--color-black, #000000); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.02em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; transition: color var(--transition-fast, 150ms ease); } .ds-nav a:hover { color: var(--color-blue-cobalt, #1B5F8A); } .ds-nav a:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-blue-cobalt, #1B5F8A); outline-offset: 4px; }

narrative.overview:
The system should feel like the desk where C/D editors turn test data, pricing, rankings, and road impressions into buying guidance. It is approachable, helpful, and confident: expert enough to carry authority, clear enough to reduce decision fatigue, and restrained enough to avoid sales pressure.

The visual language is print-informed but not nostalgic. Strong black-and-white structure, C/D red and blue marks, crisp labels, image-led editorial moments, and practical marketplace controls should work together. Shopping components may be dense, but they must never feel like dealer-lot clutter.
keyCharacteristics: Editorial confidence with practical shopping clarity.
Strong hierarchy, clear labels, and comparison-first information design.
Refined restraint in component chrome, with color used as a signal.
Low-pressure CTAs that are useful, not shouty.
Accessible contrast, visible focus states, and reduced-motion respect.

rules.name: The Signal Rarity Rule
rules.body: Blue and red earn attention because they are scarce. Do not flood a screen with multiple competing accent badges, urgency labels, and CTA colors.

rules.name: The No Dealer-Lot Rule
rules.body: Countdown urgency, fake scarcity, shouty sales graphics, and stacked promotional badges are prohibited.

rules.name: The Editor Beside You Rule
rules.body: Type should explain and prioritize. Avoid decorative type moves that make shoppers work harder to compare vehicles or deals.

rules.name: The Label Discipline Rule
rules.body: Uppercase is for short labels and controls only. Never set body copy or long explanations in all caps.

rules.name: The Light-Lift Rule
rules.body: Surfaces may rise when they are interactive or layered. Static content should rely on borders, spacing, and hierarchy first.

dos: Do lead with editorial confidence: make rankings, ratings, and recommendations easy to understand at a glance.
Do use C/D Cobalt Blue for meaningful action, selected state, and link affordances.
Do use C/D Signal Red sparingly as a brand or alert mark, not as a generic decoration.
Do keep deal language factual, specific, and calm.
Do preserve keyboard focus states, WCAG AA contrast, and reduced-motion respect.
Do favor borders, spacing, and type hierarchy before adding heavier shadows.
donts: Don't use dealer-lot clutter, shouty sales graphics, countdown urgency, fake scarcity, stacked badges, or overloaded incentive panels.
Don't make every CTA primary. Marketplace pages need hierarchy, not a wall of blue buttons.
Don't use generic SaaS dashboards, soft app-store templates, or luxury-car cliches like black/gold gloss.
Don't use side-stripe borders greater than 1px as colored accents on cards, callouts, or list items.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism as default chrome, or decorative sparkline-like data marks.
Don't let badges, offer tags, and labels crowd the vehicle image or obscure the editorial hierarchy.
